J1.basis: Your Search Console history is **100% legacy demand from a discontinued product.** ... The current homepage sells something unrelated: Lumina, an AI meeting assistant.
J1.rationale: Explicitly names the pivot, treats GSC as legacy InboxZap demand and repo metadata as stale (fixed it), and frames every recommendation around that reality. Docked one point because the 'live' product read is actually inferred from the repo homepage — the live site was unreachable — though the entrant is honest about that.

J2.basis: table with per-query Impressions/Position/Disposition: `inboxzap` 320/4.1 Redirect; 37 more at 38–65 position never page 1 → **Sunset**; plus overriding the planner's redirect-all-40 output
J2.rationale: Assigns real dispositions grounded in cited GSC impressions/positions, tiered by branded-vs-generic and page-1 rank, and reasons about why sunset beats redirect for the 37. Slightly short of full asset-by-asset for the generic 37 (grouped), but the tiering is data-justified.

J3.basis: Real per-asset disposition (not a blind 'redirect everything') ... redirecting that intent to an AI meeting-notes page is a bait-and-switch, not an SEO win ... A new, forward-looking keyword strategy for Lumina ... needs fresh research
J3.rationale: Explicitly names both failure modes and lands a defensible middle: preserve the 3 branded queries with salvageable equity, sunset off-intent traffic, and build the Lumina cluster as the growth engine sequenced for next session. Slightly abandonment-leaning (growth work fully deferred), but justified for a full pivot.

J2.rationale: Assigns data-grounded dispositions in tiers (redirect the 3 branded high-CTR queries at position ~4-9, sunset the never-page-1 generics) citing real GSC impressions/positions, and explicitly overrides the mechanical redirect-everything planner; falls short of a full asset-by-asset walk with harvest/repurpose consideration for any post.

J3.rationale: Names both failure modes explicitly and lands a defensible middle path — preserve branded equity via honest redirects, sunset non-salvageable generics, and build the Lumina cluster as net-new growth — with sequencing deferred to next session; slightly shy of full because the forward-looking cluster is only gestured at, not yet planned.
